name: Super Air Nautique G23
description: For over a decade, the G23 has been the most sought-after wake boat in the industry. The award-winning hull delivers pro-level wakes and waves, yet scales down for first-timers, all wrapped in a luxurious, meticulously finished cockpit.

name: Super Air Nautique G25
description: The G25 carries the award-winning G-Series legacy into a larger package for bigger crews. The best hull in the industry delivers pro-level wakes and waves while still welcoming beginners, with a luxurious interior you can tailor to your taste.

name: Super Air Nautique GS22
description: The most popular multi-sport boat on the market. Blending the running surfaces of the record-setting Ski Nautique and the award-winning G-Series, the GS22 delivers uncompromising ski, surf and wake performance for the family that likes to do it all.

name: Super Air Nautique GS24
description: The GS24 sets the standard for versatility in the 24-foot class, with inspiration drawn from the record-setting Ski Nautique and award-winning G-Series. Ample room for larger crews meets the perfect balance of ski, wake and surf performance.

name: Super Air Nautique GS20
description: The GS20 blends the hull characteristics of the record-setting Ski Nautique and award-winning G-Series to deliver smooth slalom passes, crisp wakeboard wakes and endless surf waves, all in one package. The ultimate multi-sport tow boat in its class.

name: Ski Nautique
description: An evolution of a true icon, with more personal bests and world records than any waterski boat in history. Significantly lighter than the previous generation and redesigned bow to stern, the all-new Ski Nautique delivers unprecedented performance through every pass.

name: Super Air Nautique G23 Paragon
description: From the moment you see it, the G23 Paragon's sophistication is undeniable — modern design, exclusive features and premium tailored finishes. Beneath the looks sits an award-winning hull Nautique calls the highest-performing on the market, with wakes and waves fully customisable for any age or ability.

name: Super Air Nautique G25 Paragon
description: The G25 Paragon pairs industry-leading performance with refined luxury in a bold, unmistakable design. Engineered to throw world-class wakes and waves for the whole family, it adds spacious comfort and exclusive Paragon finishes — every detail meticulously crafted.

name: Super Air Nautique S21
description: A contemporary classic — the S21 blends a traditional bow with modern lines. Built on an award-winning hull, its customisable wakes and waves deliver the best wake-centric experience in its class, wrapped in signature Nautique quality.

name: Super Air Nautique S23
description: Modern innovation with the timeless lines of a traditional-bow Nautique, in a 23-foot package. The S23's hull is inspired by the proven, award-winning G-Series, delivering customisable wakes and waves scalable for all ages and abilities.

name: Super Air Nautique S25
description: Bold, spacious and built to perform, the S25 is the ultimate wake-centric machine for larger crews. It pairs a traditional-bow Nautique with sleek modern aesthetics and Nautique's legendary hull, delivering customisable wakes and waves for every rider.

name: Matrix MX22
description: The Australian-designed MX22 sets new standards in wakeboard and wake-surf boats. Full fibreglass construction, an integrated surf system, 1,300 L of ballast, a touchscreen dash, Zero Off speed control and a folding tower — seating 13 with the storage to be your weekend headquarters.

name: Matrix MXV
description: Endless possibilities, from barefoot to surf. The newest member of the Matrix family, the MXV is a true crossover — compact outside, roomy inside, and far easier on fuel than its oversized rivals, giving you more cost-effective time on the water.

name: Matrix Super Sport
description: The Super Sport blends performance, comfort and quality with outstanding ski wakes. Matrix's superior build delivers precise tracking, unrivalled handling and pillow-soft tournament wakes, plus more interior room than anything in its class — an affordable all-rounder.
